mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_agents(project_id, name, role, model_tier, status, parent_id, prompt) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{description.name}, #{description.role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.modelTier}, #{description.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.parent, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.prompt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE project_agents SET name = #{description.name}, role = #{description.role, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_tier = #{description.modelTier}, status = #{description.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_id = #{description.parent, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, prompt = #{description.prompt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM project_agents WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
